heading: Definitions
label: 18111 Definitions
text: Unless specifically provided for otherwise, the definitions contained in shall apply with respect to this title.section 300gg–91 of this title1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis title, where footnoted in text, is title I of , , , which enacted this chapter and enacted, amended, and transferred numerous other sections and notes in the Code. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 111–148124 Stat. 130Mar. 23, 2010
